Name: Neighborhood Marketing Campaign
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Slightly reduces car preference in one neighborhood for 6 weeks.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Cheap nudge; stacks well with new stops, fare discounts, and car-free events.

Name: Add Bus Stop
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds a bus stop; improves walking access but slightly slows buses on that line.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Good early tactical choice when a line passes near dense residential tiles.

Name: Add Standard Bus
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds bus capacity to one line; reduces crowding and car substitution on that corridor.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Core bus scaling option and a natural beginner default.

Name: Painted Bike Lane
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds low-cost cycling access along a road segment with a modest safety bonus.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Best when paired with bike parking or bike-to-transit policy support.

Name: Protected Bike Lane
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Strongly improves bike safety and mode share but removes or narrows a car lane.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Creates congestion tension; great with traffic calming and car-lite policies.

Name: Bus Priority Lane
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves bus speed on a corridor and reduces bus commute cost; may worsen car delay nearby.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Key synergy with bus frequency and bus signal priority.

Name: Bus Signal Priority
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves bus travel time through signalized intersections.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Low friction bus upgrade; combos with priority lanes and express buses.

Name: Traffic Light Retiming
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces intersection delay for all modes in one district for 8 weeks.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Flexible default that helps road-heavy and transit-heavy strategies.

Name: Real-Time Arrival Signs
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves transit attractiveness at selected stops by reducing perceived wait time.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Best at transfer hubs and high-frequency bus corridors.

Name: Bus Shelter Upgrade
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves bus attractiveness at exposed stops, especially during rain or snow events.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Small but reliable; weather synergy.

Name: Fare Discount Weekend
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Temporarily reduces fares on weekends and shifts discretionary trips from cars.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Cheap demand test; can pair with festivals and car-free days.

Name: Employer Transit Pass Pilot
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Increases transit mode share for commuters to one commercial or industrial cluster.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with office district growth and work-from-home policies.

Name: School Travel Plan
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces morning car trips around schools through walking, biking, and bus coordination.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Good localized congestion relief; pairs with safe crossings.

Name: Crosswalk Upgrade
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves pedestrian safety and walking attractiveness at one dangerous crossing.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Small default ability that makes walking networks matter.

Name: Bike Parking Corral
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves bike access near transit stops or commercial centers.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Cheap connector for bike-transit strategies.

Name: Park-and-Ride Lot
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Captures suburban car trips before they enter the core, but induces some extra driving nearby.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Useful bridge strategy; can conflict with anti-car policies.

Name: Curb Pricing Pilot
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Charges busy curb space; reduces cruising and raises small weekly revenue.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Synergizes with freight delivery windows and parking reform policies.

Name: Pothole Repair Blitz
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Temporarily improves bus, bike, and car reliability on rough roads.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Good response to pothole events; accessible baseline tool.

Name: Queue Jump Lane
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Lets buses skip a congested intersection; improves line reliability.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Focused version of bus priority for tight budgets.

Name: Pop-Up Pedestrian Plaza
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Converts a short street segment to walking space; reduces local car access but boosts walking.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Trial version of permanent plaza policies; event-friendly.

Name: Speed Limit Reduction
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves safety and walking comfort while slightly increasing car travel time.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Simple lever with policy synergies around Vision Zero.

Name: Transit Ambassador Team
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves perceived safety and wayfinding on selected transit lines.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with night service and tourism events.

Name: Neighborhood Mobility Survey
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reveals hidden commute demand and improves future advisor recommendations for that area.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Draft-smoothing ability; useful when map information is incomplete.

Name: Microgrant for Bike Groups
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Slightly boosts bike adoption city-wide for 8 weeks.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Low-cost culture-building; pairs with bike lane construction.

Name: Tactical Bus Stop Consolidation
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Removes or merges weak stops to improve bus speed, with a small access penalty nearby.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Teaches tradeoffs; strong with real-time signs and shelters.

Name: Neighborhood Carpool Drive
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Slightly reduces single-occupancy car trips for 8 weeks.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Works as a bridge when transit capital is not ready.

Name: Temporary HOV Lane
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves carpool and bus speeds on a corridor while reducing regular car capacity.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Combos with carpool policies; can provoke driver backlash events.

Name: Transit Fare Integration Study
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Unlocks better future fare policy offers and slightly improves transfer attractiveness.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Meta-progression inside a run; policy synergy seed.

Name: Bus Line Split
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Splits an overlong bus line into two shorter lines; improves reliability but may add transfers.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Good with transfer discounts and frequent-grid policies.

Name: Bus Line Extension
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Extends a bus line to new residential or job tiles.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Works best when demand survey has revealed underserved commute flows.

Name: Express Bus Overlay
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds limited-stop express service on a high-demand corridor.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Needs enough density; strong with bus priority and park-and-ride.

Name: Night Bus Service
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds late-night trips and reduces off-peak car dependence.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Synergizes with Night Shift Economy and entertainment events.

Name: Weekend Bus Frequency Boost
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves weekend service, increasing non-commute transit share.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Good with festivals, shopping districts, and fare discounts.

Name: Electric Bus Purchase
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds bus capacity with lower operating emissions and slightly lower fuel volatility exposure.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with electrification policy and smog events.

Name: Articulated Bus Purchase
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds high capacity to a busy bus line without adding as many vehicles.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Works on trunk corridors; weaker on narrow streets.

Name: Bus Depot Expansion
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Raises maximum bus fleet size and reduces maintenance penalties.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Strategic unlock for bus-heavy runs.

Name: Bus Driver Hiring Fair
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Temporarily increases available operators and protects service from shortage events.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Can blunt strike or labor shortage events if paired with fair wage policies.

Name: Transit Operations Center
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves delay recovery across bus and tram networks.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Reliability engine; pairs with real-time data policies.

Name: Dynamic Bus Dispatch
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Shifts spare buses toward crowded lines each week.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Makes bus strategy more resilient to event spikes.

Name: Demand-Responsive Shuttle
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Serves low-density areas with flexible routing; modestly reduces car trips where fixed transit is weak.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Good rural/suburban connector; can feed rail stations.

Name: Airport Express Bus
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves transit access to airport or tourism node; reduces taxi and rental-car trips.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Strong during tourism, convention, and sports events.

Name: BRT Station Upgrade
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Converts key bus stops into high-quality rapid transit stations.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Capital-heavy bus anchor; pairs with off-board payment.

Name: Off-Board Fare Payment
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Speeds boarding on selected bus or tram lines.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Best with crowded corridors and proof-of-payment policy.

Name: All-Door Boarding Pilot
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces dwell time on one line with minor fare evasion risk.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Policy synergy with fare enforcement reform.

Name: Transit Lane Camera Enforcement
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Protects bus lane speed by reducing illegal car use.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Combos with bus priority lanes and congestion charge.

Name: Bus Bulb Construction
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Lets buses stop without merging; improves speed and pedestrian space but narrows traffic.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Good small upgrade for dense mixed-use streets.

Name: Tram Stop
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds a tram stop; improves access but can slow the tram if overused.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Mid-tier capacity path between bus and subway.

Name: Tram Vehicle
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds tram capacity to a line and attracts riders on dense corridors.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with transit-oriented development policies.

Name: Dedicated Tram Right-of-Way
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Greatly improves tram speed while removing car capacity from a corridor.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): High-impact anti-congestion move if alternatives are ready.

Name: Streetcar Loop Extension
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds a central tram loop serving dense jobs and retail.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Tourism and downtown synergy; expensive operating commitment.

Name: Tram Signal Preemption
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves tram reliability through intersections.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Similar to bus signal priority but better for rail runs.

Name: Tram Depot Upgrade
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Raises tram fleet cap and reduces maintenance disruption events.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Strategic unlock for tram-focused drafts.

Name: Subway Station
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds a subway station; massively improves high-density access near the station.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Core late-game urban transit investment.

Name: Subway Extension 1KM
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Extends subway track by 1 km; unlocks new station placement and faster trips.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Mega-project; requires stable budget or subsidy policies.

Name: Subway Frequency Increase
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces wait time on an existing subway line and absorbs high demand.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Strong with dense residential and CBD growth.

Name: Subway Platform Screen Doors
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves safety and reduces incident delays on subway lines.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Defensive upgrade against accident and protest events.

Name: Subway Automation Upgrade
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces long-term operating cost and improves frequency cap after a long implementation delay.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Rare transformational pick; high upfront pain.

Name: New Subway Yard
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Raises subway fleet cap and resilience.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Only worth it for subway-centered strategies.

Name: Commuter Rail Station
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Captures long-distance trips from outer residential areas.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with park-and-ride, regional fare integration, and WFH policies.

Name: Commuter Rail Trainset
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds commuter rail capacity and reduces peak car inflow.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Strong during immigration boom and suburban growth.

Name: Commuter Rail Electrification Segment
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves speed, emissions, and fuel shock resilience on a rail corridor.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Combos with green bond and electrification policies.

Name: Regional Rail Through-Running
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Connects commuter lines through the core to reduce transfers and downtown terminal pressure.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Run-defining mega project with huge network effects.

Name: Ferry Terminal
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds water crossing transit access where geography supports it.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Future river/water map hook; pairs with tourism.

Name: Ferry Vessel
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds ferry capacity and reduces bridge or tunnel car pressure.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Weather-sensitive; strong with waterfront development.

Name: Bike Share Dock
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds short-trip cycling access and improves first/last-mile transit reach.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Best near subway, commuter rail, and university districts.

Name: E-Bike Share Upgrade
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves cycling range and hill tolerance across bike share docks.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with protected lanes and low-emission policies.

Name: Cargo Bike Delivery Hub
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces short freight van trips in dense commercial areas.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Synergy with curb pricing and delivery window policies.

Name: Protected Intersection
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves bike and pedestrian safety at a major junction.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Makes bike investments more effective on dangerous corridors.

Name: Neighborhood Greenway
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Creates a low-stress walking and biking corridor through local streets.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with school travel and traffic calming policies.

Name: Pedestrian Overpass
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves walking access across highways or rail barriers without slowing cars.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Useful on hostile infrastructure maps; less urbanist than crossings.

Name: Pedestrian Underpass Renewal
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves safety and access through an existing underpass.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Combos with ambassador team and lighting policies.

Name: Main Street Sidewalk Widening
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Boosts walking and retail access but removes curb parking or a car lane.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with parking reform and plaza strategies.

Name: Accessible Curb Ramp Program
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves walking access for all ages and abilities city-wide.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Reliable equity pick; increases support for transit policies.

Name: Safe Routes to Transit
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves walk and bike access within a radius of chosen stations.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Excellent with rail stations and bus hubs.

Name: Traffic Calming Package
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces local shortcut driving and improves walking and biking safety.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with low-traffic neighborhood policies.

Name: Low-Traffic Neighborhood Trial
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Blocks through traffic on local streets; reduces car convenience but improves active modes.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Can trigger backlash unless paired with outreach.

Name: Car Lane Addition
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces congestion on one road segment but increases car demand and downstream traffic.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Useful in emergency or car-friendly runs; risky long term.

Name: Intersection Turn Lane
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves car throughput at one bottleneck but worsens crossing comfort.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Synergy with freight corridors; anti-synergy with walkability.

Name: Road Diet
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Converts excess car lanes into safety, bus, or bike space; reduces crashes and car speed.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Good with safety policies and bus/bike abilities.

Name: Car Tunnel 1KM
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Moves car traffic underground for 1 km; reduces surface congestion but induces demand.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Mega road option; may pair with surface pedestrianization.

Name: Bridge Widening
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves crossing capacity but increases car dependency.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Future water maps; strong short-term relief, weak climate score.

Name: New Multimodal Bridge
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds transit, bike, pedestrian, and car crossing capacity.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Expensive but flexible; event reward candidate.

Name: Freight Signal Priority
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves truck reliability on industrial corridors without broadly helping commuters.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with delivery policies and port events.

Name: Urban Freight Consolidation Center
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces delivery vehicle trips into dense areas.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Works with cargo bike hubs and curb pricing.

Name: Parking Meter Expansion
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces cruising for parking and generates weekly revenue.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Negative operating cost means net revenue; may anger drivers.

Name: Remove Minimum Parking Lot
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Converts selected public parking area into developable or civic space; reduces car convenience.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with TOD and pedestrian plaza policies.

Name: Congestion Charge Gantries
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Charges vehicles entering a zone; reduces peak car trips and generates revenue.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Powerful with exemptions policy choices; politically risky.

Name: Downtown Toll Tunnel
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds tolled car capacity and revenue but may induce driving.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Car-compatible budget strategy.

Name: License Plate Camera Network
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Enables enforcement abilities for bus lanes, tolls, and low-emission zones.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Infrastructure prerequisite for several policies.

Name: Smart Parking Guidance
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces cruising congestion near major destinations.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with event venues and parking pricing.

Name: Construction Coordination Office
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces congestion penalties from overlapping construction projects.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Defensive pick for capital-heavy runs.

Name: Fast-Track Permitting Team
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Shortens build times for small mobility projects for 12 weeks.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Great before a burst of bike/bus improvements.

Name: Public Consultation Roadshow
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces backlash risk from disruptive projects in one district.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with road diets, LTN trials, and congestion charges.

Name: Transit-Oriented Zoning Hearing
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves chance that future policy choices include density near transit.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Bridge between abilities and permanent policy draft.

Name: Federal Grant Application
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Chance to receive a large one-time capital grant in several weeks.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): High variance; affected by federal government events.

Name: Green Bond Issuance
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Provides immediate capital for low-emission projects with a long operating repayment.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Enables big plays early at budget risk.

Name: Advisor Recruitment Fair
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Adds an advisor slot or improves future ability draft variety.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Directly supports run variety.

Name: Data Science Hiring Sprint
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves demand forecasts and reveals stronger ability synergies in choices.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Good for players who want less randomness.

Name: Open Mobility Data Portal
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Slightly improves public support and unlocks civic-tech event options.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with transparency policies.

Name: Transit App Partnership
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves wayfinding and multimodal trip planning city-wide.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Great with complex networks and fare integration.

Name: Integrated Wayfinding Signs
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves transfers between bus, tram, subway, rail, bike share, and walking.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Network glue for mixed-mode runs.

Name: Mobility Wallet Pilot
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Gives targeted residents credits for transit, bike share, and car share instead of car trips.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with equity fares and parking cash-out policies.

Name: Low-Income Fare Pass
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Increases transit access and ridership among price-sensitive residents.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Powerful with subsidies; budget pressure tradeoff.

Name: Student U-Pass Expansion
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Boosts transit use around schools and universities.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Strong with night bus and bike share.

Name: Senior Shuttle Program
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves accessibility for older residents in low-density areas.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Equity option; can soften service cut backlash.

Name: Paratransit Dispatch Upgrade
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves specialized transit reliability and public approval.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with accessible curb ramp program.

Name: Transit Safety Lighting
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves perceived safety at stops, paths, and underpasses.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Good with night service and ambassador team.

Name: Station Cleaning Surge
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Temporarily improves transit attractiveness and reduces disorder events.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Useful when ridership is slipping from perception issues.

Name: Anti-Smoking Station Campaign
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Small perceived safety and comfort gain at stations.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Niche but cheap draft filler.

Name: Fare Evasion Amnesty Week
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves public trust and may increase future pass adoption, with short-term fare loss.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Pairs with low-income fare policy.

Name: Targeted Fare Inspection
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Recovers revenue and deters evasion but can reduce approval if overused.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Tradeoff option with proof-of-payment systems.

Name: Maintenance Overtime
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Temporarily reduces breakdown risk across transit fleets.

Name: Spare Parts Stockpile
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces duration of vehicle breakdown and supply chain events.

Name: Snow Route Prep
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces snow event penalties for buses, bikes, and walking.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Weather defense.

Name: Heat-Resilient Track Work
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces heat wave delay risk for rail and tram systems.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Climate adaptation investment.

Name: Flood Barrier for Station
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Protects one vulnerable subway, tram, or rail station from flood events.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Map-specific defensive pick.

Name: Emergency Bus Bridge Plan
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Improves response options during subway, tram, or rail closures.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Good insurance for rail-heavy runs.

Name: Special Event Transit Plan
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Prepares extra service and street management for venues for 4 weeks.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Strong before sports, concert, festival, Olympics.

Name: VIP Motorcade Detour Plan
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces disruption from VIP visits and security closures.
Notes (misc brainstorm section): Niche event counter; can be randomly valuable.

Name: Protest Liaison Team
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces duration and harm from protest-related street closures.

Name: Tourism Shuttle
Effects (description of gameplay modifie: Reduces car and taxi trips around hotel and attraction districts.

Name: Car Share Pod

Name: Vanpool Program

Name: Climate Communication Campaign
